channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Multiple potholes / road sueface failed, 21st May
item.description:
Glencairn Court - full length of adopted highway. Wearing course is failing throughout - large patches where tarmac is now just loose material - if swept up would leave large potholes. Remaining surface is covered in cracks and starting to break up. Needs major works, not just random patching (which is what has been done for at least 10 years).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glencairn Court, Lansdown, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolley on the site for 2 weeks now, 21st May
item.description:
Dowty road and Newton road corner.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55;57;59;61, Newton Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown Tree, 21st May
item.description:
As per the photos attached, this tree is dangerous as it is dangerous coming onto and off the drive way of 31 Ermin Park. My dad is a cancer patient and I take him to all his appointments but this is now getting extremely dangerous as we struggle to see vehicles coming from the right due to how over grown it is. I believe the council (Tewkesbury) have reported it but still no action has been done. Look forward to your response, many thanks Claire Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Mostham Place, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree, continually falling branches, 21st May
item.description:
Large mature tree outside 138 Leckhampton Road, which significantly overhangs our property. In windy weather - such as last week and every winter - large branches fall both onto our property, vehicles, and onto the path. This has happened over many years, and poses an ongoing risk to our family, pedestrians and our vehicles. Might someone kindly carry out a safety inspection, and undertake necessary pruning to reduce risk of further falling branches?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138, Leckhampton Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ocado delivery van reversed into bollard, 21st May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, North Street, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Complete bollard is damaged (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Loads of potholes worsening on the junction, 21st May
item.description:
Junction outside cornerstones. Loads of potholes worsening every day, one or two with paint around but nowhere near all of them. Awful to drive over.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 89, Whaddon Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A tree with a dangerous branch overhanging my property, 21st May
item.description:
There is a large tree on the highway land behind my property (3 Coburn Gardens). One of the branches is overhanging our garden at a threatening angle and appears to be weakening. It may fail in a high wind and so poses a safety risk. This risk will increase with time. I would be grateful if the Highways team could inspect the tree and assess whether the branch requires remedial work

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telstar Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
